meta.title: LetsFG — Find cheap flights. Say where you're going.
meta.description: Agent-native flight search. 180+ airlines, zero markup. Just tell us where you want to go.

hero.tagline: Finding a flight shouldn't mean checking 47 websites. So we built this. No markup. No tracking. No prices jumping because you looked twice.

destinations.tokyo_query: NYC to Tokyo in June, business class
destinations.newYork_query: London to New York next month

features.intro: Built by a community of travelers. Finding a flight shouldn't mean checking 47 websites. So we built something about it. Made with ❤️ by travelers, for travelers.
features.open_source: We're open source — the entire search technology running here is publicly available. If you use an AI agent like Claude Code or OpenClaw, it can pull the code and run searches for you.
features.contribute: Know how to code or use Claude Code?
features.share: Share with friends. People power LetsFG — every search makes it faster for everyone. The more people, the better and faster the results.
features.star: Don't have GitHub? That's fine — you can create an account in 10 seconds with Google. A star is just a way of saying you like it.

SearchingTasks.pillFirstSearch: First to search — unlocking for others
SearchingTasks.pillInfoBody: No one searched this route in the last 5 minutes, so your agent is scanning every airline from scratch. Once done, this route is cached — the next person gets instant results.
SearchingTasks.subtitle: Scanning airlines, OTAs, and hidden combinations all at once.

Results.expiredNoticeSub: Prices change fast. Start a fresh search for current fares.

Checkout.bookingLinkReady: Your booking link is ready. Click below to go to the airline.
Checkout.unlockDesc: Pay a small fee once to get the booking link. After that, every flight from this search is unlocked — so you can come back and pick a different one for free. Works for this search only.
Checkout.shareToUnlock: or share to unlock for free
Checkout.shareDesc: Share LetsFG (website, profile, or GitHub) on social media or send it to a friend, then upload a screenshot below.
Checkout.screenshotInvalid: Screenshot not valid — please take a clear screenshot and try again.
Checkout.verifySub: Our AI is verifying your share. This takes a few seconds.
Checkout.unlockFirst: Unlock first to reveal the booking link
Checkout.instagram_step1: Share this deal on your Instagram (post, story, or DM a friend)
Checkout.instagram_step2: Take a screenshot showing you shared it
Checkout.tiktok_step1: Share this deal on TikTok (video, story, or send to a friend)
Checkout.tiktok_step2: Take a screenshot showing you shared it
Checkout.twitter_step1: Share this deal on Twitter/X (tweet or DM a friend)
Checkout.twitter_step2: Take a screenshot showing you shared it
Checkout.facebook_step1: Share this deal on Facebook (post, story, or message a friend)
Checkout.facebook_step2: Take a screenshot showing you shared it
Checkout.message_step1: Send this deal to a friend via WhatsApp, iMessage, or any messenger
Checkout.message_step2: Take a screenshot of the conversation showing you sent it
